step_by_step_reasoning: IoT sensors stream shipment telemetry to AWS IoT Core, which scales to handle device security and ingestion. A Lambda function processes these events and forwards them through an Application Load Balancer (ELB) to Hyperledger Fabric smart contracts hosted on Amazon EKS. Blockchain state changes are duplicated off-chain to DynamoDB to support real-time dashboards for supply chain analysts. When temperature thresholds are breached, EKS triggers SNS notifications to redirect truck drivers. Cryptographic security is secured with CloudHSM, while CloudWatch handles container logging and metrics.

graph.name: Accenture Circular Supply Chain
graph.notes: Ensures sustainable supply chain visibility using Hyperledger Fabric on EKS and off-chain caching in DynamoDB for real-time tracking of agricultural shipments.

nodes.name: IoT Sensors
nodes.notes: Monitors shipping conditions such as temperature on farms and trucks.

nodes.name: AWS IoT Core
nodes.notes: Ingests high-volume telemetry securely from edge devices.

nodes.name: Threshold Processor
nodes.notes: Evaluates incoming data points against predefined safety rules.

nodes.name: Application Load Balancer
nodes.notes: Balances requests to the private blockchain network.

nodes.name: Hyperledger Fabric EKS Cluster
nodes.notes: Runs containerized blockchain nodes and smart contracts.

nodes.name: Off-Chain Datastore
nodes.notes: DATA_PEEK: Real-time cache of blockchain ledger data for high-performance reads.

nodes.name: Supply Chain Managers
nodes.notes: Views real-time analytics dashboards for shipment tracking.

nodes.name: Alert Notifications
nodes.notes: Triggers push notifications when thresholds are crossed.

nodes.name: Truck Driver
nodes.notes: Receives rerouting notifications in case of shipment spoilage.

nodes.name: CloudHSM
nodes.notes: Secures cryptographic keys and integrates with on-premise HSMs.

nodes.name: CloudWatch
nodes.notes: Monitors EKS containers and tracks ledger health.

edges.notes: Smart contract triggers alert on exceptions.
Alerts driver to divert spoiled produce.
Fetches cryptographic keys for signing transactions.
